title: Sitting+
description:
How much can you express yourself with a single key?
20+ togglable animations for contextual sitting scenarios, role play to the next level.
body:
![Sitting+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b6f6d7782c7f398e09a61f22fd608bf3e5461e.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JnRtoDNfJhs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

How much can you express yourself with a single key?
 

Sitting+ is a contextual sitting mod.

 

With this mod you can sit anywhere by pressing x: ![sitting](https://i.imgur.com/EX44BKW.gif)


You can toggle poses to better fit the mood of the environment or roleplay purposes:
![https://i.imgur.com/PAEz7ok.gif](https://i.imgur.com/PAEz7ok.gif)


You can sit On a fence:

![https://i.imgur.com/ZouwpUV.gif](https://i.imgur.com/ZouwpUV.gif)


You can relax:

![https://i.imgur.com/P63ZXbD.gif](https://i.imgur.com/P63ZXbD.gif)


Or right click a stair to sit on it:

![https://i.imgur.com/DlGc4d9.gif](https://i.imgur.com/DlGc4d9.gif)


(You must be completely immobile for the animation to trigger)
 

Sitting with a item in hand triggers that specific item custom pose.

![https://i.imgur.com/ZZG7S4Z.gif](https://i.imgur.com/ZZG7S4Z.gif)

...

![https://i.imgur.com/LMXzqfS.gif](https://i.imgur.com/LMXzqfS.gif)

...

![https://i.imgur.com/10kwN2n.gif](https://i.imgur.com/10kwN2n.gif)

 (But you can use a item specific pose with basically anything you have in your inventory, once you trigger the item pose just switch to another item.)

 
Here's a amazing video of The channel Enderverse showcasing how this and my other mods work best together:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6KpGUbnCGNs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Like the video shows, I highly recommend you to use this mod with a first person mod like real camera mod, or a third person mod like Better Third Person mod..

 

This mod needs Player Animator 1.0.2. [https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)


</details>

If anyone want to use this mod in a modpack, or showcase the mod in a video be my guest. Send me a private message with the link so I can play the modpack or watch the video too.

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
